title: Wolfgang Wienand to Join Mettler Toledo Board of Directors
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) announced today that Dr. Wolfgang Wienand has been appointed to its Board of Directors, effective November 1st, 2023. Dr. Wienand is the Chief Executive Officer of Siegfried Holding AG (SIX: SFZN), a global leader in contract development and manufacturing (CDMO) for the pharmaceutical industry. He joined Siegfried in 2010 as Member of the Executive Committee, initially serving as Chief Scientific Officer, then as Chi.
